remarks: Welcome to this beautifully renovated two-bedroom condo in one of Darien's most convenient locations. Just steps from Goodwives shopping center, the Metro-North train station, and the vibrant energy of downtown Darien, this home offers the perfect blend of modern comfort and walkable lifestyle. Pass through the private gate and be greeted by a serene personal courtyard and garden. A sliding glass door from the living area provides seamless access to this peaceful outdoor retreat-ideal for morning coffee, evening relaxation, or entertaining. The open-concept main level features a bright, updated kitchen that flows effortlessly into the dining and living areas. A cozy fireplace anchors the living room, creating a warm and inviting space for gatherings or quiet nights in. Upstairs, the primary suite impresses with dramatic vaulted ceilings and an enviable en-suite bathroom. Soak in the large soaking tub or enjoy the separate shower after a long day. A second en-suite bedroom and laundry is also located on this level. This turnkey condo is move-in ready with thoughtful updates throughout. Whether you're looking for an easy commute to New York City, a low-maintenance home base near shops and restaurants, or simply a stylish retreat in the heart of Darien, 4 Sedgwick Village Lane delivers
